ideation: This sequence depicts a gentle, upward-reaching movement, suggesting the delicate nature of a hyacinth.  The arms start in a relaxed position, then gracefully rise, mimicking the upward growth of the flower. Finally, the arms return to a resting pose, conveying a sense of calm and completion.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the elegance of the hyacinth. The left arm will lead and be slightly more prominent than the right arm.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, still and calm
left arm reaches up gently, right arm follows slightly
both arms continue their slow, elegant ascent
arms return to rest, the bloom is complete
